title: [Dessert Vibes, The Drop]
description: Small and flat-bottomed, the room is a small hole that looks like it was roughly dug out, with uneven walls and small piles of clay-rich dirt off to the sides.  Stuck into the walls at the ceiling are several long bamboo poles which dangle large hard candy sculptures.  Haphazardly arrayed across the dirt floor are a series of red and white candy-striped burlap pillows.  A broad driftwood sign hands askew on the wall, loosely nailed into the dirt.  Several votives placed along the room's edges light the hole.
